code:
import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(text, "\n")
mut found = false
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
while i < lines.len()
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    let trimmed = string.trim(s)
    if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
      found = true
      result = s
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  println(result)
else
  println("(none)")
end
